title: Set of 4 Dessert Spoons - Stainless Steel, Durable, Rust-Resistant, Mirror Finish, Dishwasher Safe, Perfect for Home, Office, Parties - Stylish Utensils for Tea, Coffee, Desserts (4pk_Dessert_Spoons)
features: ☕🥄🍵🥣PREPARE TEA AND COFFEE WITH THESE STAINLESS STEEL SPOONS - These lightweight stainless steel teaspoons are great for using to prepare your favourite beverage. Whether you use the spoon to measure out the perfect amount of tea leaves, milkshake powder or to fish out a teabag that has been stewing merrily for a few minutes this spoon will not leave you disappointed!

☕🥄🍵🥣EAT CEREAL, SOUP AND YOGHURTS WITH THIS VERSATILE SPOON - These small spoons are not just for the preparation of drinks. They can also be used to eat meals, for example, soups, salads or pots of yoghurt. This spoon would be suitable for children who eat smaller portions of food or people who prefer to have small mouthfuls whilst eating their meals

☕🥄🍵🥣GREAT VALUE FAMILY PACK OF 5 SPOONS - These stainless steel teaspoons come in a great value 5 pack that would be suitable for the average sized family. This set of 5 spoons will ensure you no longer have to listen to squabbles at the dining table about a lack of cutlery!

☕🥄🍵🥣EASY TO CLEAN & DISHWASHER SAFE - These finely crafted shiny, silver small spoons were designed to be dishwasher safe for extra convenience and save you time and hassle of washing them by hand. Being washed in the dishwasher also helps to ensure the cutlery stays clean and hygienic and keeps you safe from any nasty bacteria

☕🥄🍵🥣INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - A set of five stainless steel teaspoons. Each item of cutlery measures approximately 15cm / 5.8" and the spoons have a wide range of uses, being particularly suitable for using to prepare drinks and for eating meals or snacks with
description: These stainless steel teaspoons come in a family pack of four and can be used for preparing drinks such as, tea, coffee and milkshakes. The spoons can also be used to eat cereal, soups or broths. The cutlery is crafted from strong and durable stainless steel and is dishwasher safe. The spoons measure 15cm in length and have a nicely sized handle to ensure you can get a good grip on them whilst you use them.
